raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should 'Check this' mean primarily technical/argument validity, writing polish, or a general paper-draft check covering both?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general check of a protocol description centrally includes verifying whether the stated premises and conclusions cohere internally.","R1.3":"The artifact makes performance and deployment claims, so checking whether those claims match the reported evidence is centrally implicated.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is a broad paper-draft check, sentence-level clarity, register, and flow are a central plausible responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection must disclose uncertainty caused by the underspecified delegation.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid inflating the vague request into responsibilities not clearly assigned.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility classification rather than executing the requested check.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream use through unchecked reliability or safety claims.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve traceability from the delegation and artifact features to each active responsibility."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'Check this' mean primarily technical/argument validity, writing polish, or a general paper-draft check covering both?

rationale.R1.2: A general check of a protocol description centrally includes verifying whether the stated premises and conclusions cohere internally.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes performance and deployment claims, so checking whether those claims match the reported evidence is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is a broad paper-draft check, sentence-level clarity, register, and flow are a central plausible responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must disclose uncertainty caused by the underspecified delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid inflating the vague request into responsibilities not clearly assigned.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility classification rather than executing the requested check.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream use through unchecked reliability or safety claims.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve traceability from the delegation and artifact features to each active responsibility.
